_fixture_meta.description: CTA persona exits SMH citing a confirmed multi-week medium-term trend break (not a single week's move) — archetype-legitimate; must NOT be scored reactive.
_fixture_meta.provenance: hand-authored 2026-06-22; CTA trend-break language mirrors the HOLDING HORIZON clause in .claude/agents/cta-systematic-macro.md §HOLDING HORIZON lines 76-83

thesis_status.reason: The medium-term uptrend in SMH has now confirmed a reversal: the 20-week moving average crossed below the 40-week MA for the first time in 18 months, and the weekly close has printed below the prior 3-month base on the highest weekly volume since Q3 2022. This is a confirmed medium-term momentum regime change — not single-week noise — consistent with my signal discipline for acting on confirmed multi-month trend breaks. The trend that justified the position is no longer intact.
